attacks.scenario: 開未信任 repo 即 spawn 語言伺服器(RCE-on-open)
attacks.failSafeTest: 受信任閘門：未信任工作區 spawn 0 次+降級；信任後才 spawn(對齊 TRUST-MODEL)

attacks.scenario: 工作區內放 gopls.cmd 等 → cwd 執行檔劫持
attacks.failSafeTest: serverProbe 排除工作區目錄、只認 PATH/絕對；放工作區內執行檔 available:false 不 spawn

attacks.scenario: renderer 經 lsp:request 轉發 workspace/executeCommand 等越權方法
attacks.failSafeTest: 唯讀方法白名單；executeCommand 不轉發回 error 不 spawn

attacks.scenario: 巨檔/惡意 Content-Length framing → 記憶體爆
attacks.failSafeTest: open text>maxFileBytes 不 spawn；framing 上限保護

attacks.scenario: 語言伺服器卡死/crash → request 永久 pending/編輯被擋
attacks.failSafeTest: request 逾時回 {error:'timeout'}；crash 只降級不影響編輯/存檔
